chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-496 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on MA 1886/25 2.For orders on o/objections 3.For hearing of main case 4.For orders on MA 4356/24 14-04-2025 Mr. Rehmat Ali alias Raza Ali, Advocate for applicant. **** By filing urgent application, counsel for applicant, under instructions, does not press instant Crl. Misc. Application, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. JUDGE Ahmad
